title: triagegeist-code
subtitle: TriageGeist pipeline modules + cached LLM decisions
description: Companion code dataset for the TriageGeist competition notebook. Contains the full multi-scale pipeline (11-bank decomposition, coherence scoring, complaint lexicon, feature engineering, ensemble, QWK threshold optimizer, LLM residual, AnswerCertifier, TriagePacket schema) plus cached LLM decisions (29 final LLM-determined ESI assignments). Attached as `/kaggle/input/triagegeist-code/` by the public TriageGeist notebook.
